title: Traveling with Kyle - Peru Part 2 - Lima to Nazca

transcript.text: So, yes, I rode my bike down to the ocean, and I, and like Lima, it's like these cliffs go down to the ocean.
So you can overlook these waves, and I was looking at the waves, and it was the most amazing surf waves.
It would have been the most amazing surf waves I've ever seen in my life.
Lima is going to be an amazing, amazing city to live in one of these days, but the problem is it's totally polluted,
And you could actually see all the foam, you know, when the waves crash, all the foam was brown, and that's shit.
But I did see some kids surfing in there.
But, yeah, and I saw some people, they were jumping off the cliffs and paragliding off of it down there,
And I rode down to the ocean and looked at it and then rode back up,
And I took a taxi up to the top of the hill right next to the central square.
They have this really, this, like, high, like, hill that you can overlook the whole city,
But you can only see a couple of city blocks because of all the guru out the fog.
And I did a tour of the Catholic catacombs, and in the basement they have, like, hundreds and hundreds of,

And there was another interesting museum I went to, but, yeah, the catacombs were pretty.
